perturbation.original_text: this Agreement sets forth the entire agreement and understanding between the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof, and none of the terms of this Agreement may be amended or modified except by a written instrument signed by both parties
perturbation.changed_text: this Agreement sets forth the entire agreement and understanding between the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof, and none of the terms of this Agreement may be amended or modified except by a written instrument signed by both parties, unless mutually agreed upon via email correspondence.
perturbation.explanation: By adding the phrase 'unless mutually agreed upon via email correspondence,' the clause now presents two conflicting methods for amending the agreement: a written instrument signed by both parties and mutual agreement via email. This contradicts the original requirement of a formal written amendment.
perturbation.contradicted_text: OTHER PROVISIONS. The parties further agree that: (a) this Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Nebraska; (b) this Agreement sets forth the entire agreement and understanding between the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof, and none of the terms of this Agreement may be amended or modified except by a written instrument signed by both parties, unless mutually agreed upon via email correspondence.; (c) a party may waive any rights under this Agreement only by written waiver duly signed by such party, and no failure to exercise or delay in exercising a right under this Agreement shall constitute a waiver of such right; (d) this Agreement shall inure only to the benefit of the parties hereto, and the rights and obligations of each party under this Agreement may not be assigned or delegated without the consent of the other party; (e) no provision of this Agreement shall affect, limit or restrict either party's right to engage in any business in any place and at any time, whatsoever, provided the receiving party does not disclose the Confidential Data in violation of this Agreement; (f) each party agrees not to advertise, or otherwise make known to others, any <PAGE> 78 information regarding this Agreement or the Proposed Relationship except as may be required by law; (g) neither party makes any representations or warranties as to the accuracy or completeness of any Data disclosed hereunder; (h) the invalidity or unenforceability of any provision of this Agreement shall not affect the validity or enforceability of any other provision of this Agreement; (i) all notices under this Agreement must be in writing and shall be deemed to have been delivered to and received by a party, and will otherwise become effective, on the date of actual delivery thereof (by personal delivery, express delivery service or certified mail) to the Notice Address of such party set forth below; (j) this Agreement may be executed in counterparts; and (k) this Agreement is dated for all reference purposes October 14, 1998.
perturbation.justification: The changed text adds an exception allowing amendments via email, which directly contradicts the original clause stating that amendments require a written instrument signed by both parties. Since the contradicted text contains the changed text as well, there is an in-text contradiction as defined by the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' perturbation type, because the sections of the contract provide conflicting obligations regarding how the contract can be amended.

perturbation.original_text: a party may waive any rights under this Agreement only by written waiver duly signed by such party, and no failure to exercise or delay in exercising a right under this Agreement shall constitute a waiver of such right
perturbation.changed_text: a party may waive any rights under this Agreement only by written waiver duly signed by such party, or by explicitly stating it verbally, and no failure to exercise or delay in exercising a right under this Agreement shall constitute a waiver of such right
perturbation.explanation: The clause originally states that waivers must be in writing. By adding 'or by explicitly stating it verbally', there is an in-text contradiction, as a verbal waiver will go against the written format
perturbation.contradicted_text: OTHER PROVISIONS. The parties further agree that: (a) this Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Nebraska; (b) this Agreement sets forth the entire agreement and understanding between the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof, and none of the terms of this Agreement may be amended or modified except by a written instrument signed by both parties, unless mutually agreed upon via email correspondence.; (c) a party may waive any rights under this Agreement only by written waiver duly signed by such party, or by explicitly stating it verbally, and no failure to exercise or delay in exercising a right under this Agreement shall constitute a waiver of such right; (d) this Agreement shall inure only to the benefit of the parties hereto, and the rights and obligations of each party under this Agreement may not be assigned or delegated without the consent of the other party; (e) no provision of this Agreement shall affect, limit or restrict either party's right to engage in any business in any place and at any time, whatsoever, provided the receiving party does not disclose the Confidential Data in violation of this Agreement; (f) each party agrees not to advertise, or otherwise make known to others, any <PAGE> 78 information regarding this Agreement or the Proposed Relationship except as may be required by law; (g) neither party makes any representations or warranties as to the accuracy or completeness of any Data disclosed hereunder; (h) the invalidity or unenforceability of any provision of this Agreement shall not affect the validity or enforceability of any other provision of this Agreement; (i) all notices under this Agreement must be in writing and shall be deemed to have been delivered to and received by a party, and will otherwise become effective, on the date of actual delivery thereof (by personal delivery, express delivery service or certified mail) to the Notice Address of such party set forth below; (j) this Agreement may be executed in counterparts; and (k) this Agreement is dated for all reference purposes October 14, 1998.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that waivers must be in writing. The changed text introduces an alternative method for waiving rights, 'or by explicitly stating it verbally'. This directly contradicts the original requirement for written waivers and introduces inconsistency regarding how rights can be waived within the agreement. The contradicted text contains the changed text, which is a direct contradiction. This aligns with the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' where different sections provide conflicting obligations.

perturbation.original_text: all notices under this Agreement must be in writing and shall be deemed to have been delivered to and received by a party, and will otherwise become effective, on the date of actual delivery thereof (by personal delivery, express delivery service or certified mail) to the Notice Address of such party set forth below
perturbation.changed_text: all notices under this Agreement must be in writing and shall be deemed to have been delivered to and received by a party, and will otherwise become effective, on the date of actual delivery thereof (by personal delivery, express delivery service or certified mail) to the Notice Address of such party set forth below. However, any notices send via email will also be acceptable and valid
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction as the original clause specifies the ways of sending notice (by personal delivery, express delivery service or certified mail). The addition of 'However, any notices send via email will also be acceptable and valid', is an in-text contradiction. This addition is creating the in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: OTHER PROVISIONS. The parties further agree that: (a) this Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Nebraska; (b) this Agreement sets forth the entire agreement and understanding between the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof, and none of the terms of this Agreement may be amended or modified except by a written instrument signed by both parties, unless mutually agreed upon via email correspondence.; (c) a party may waive any rights under this Agreement only by written waiver duly signed by such party, or by explicitly stating it verbally, and no failure to exercise or delay in exercising a right under this Agreement shall constitute a waiver of such right; (d) this Agreement shall inure only to the benefit of the parties hereto, and the rights and obligations of each party under this Agreement may not be assigned or delegated without the consent of the other party; (e) no provision of this Agreement shall affect, limit or restrict either party's right to engage in any business in any place and at any time, whatsoever, provided the receiving party does not disclose the Confidential Data in violation of this Agreement; (f) each party agrees not to advertise, or otherwise make known to others, any <PAGE> 78 information regarding this Agreement or the Proposed Relationship except as may be required by law; (g) neither party makes any representations or warranties as to the accuracy or completeness of any Data disclosed hereunder; (h) the invalidity or unenforceability of any provision of this Agreement shall not affect the validity or enforceability of any other provision of this Agreement; (i) all notices under this Agreement must be in writing and shall be deemed to have been delivered to and received by a party, and will otherwise become effective, on the date of actual delivery thereof (by personal delivery, express delivery service or certified mail) to the Notice Address of such party set forth below. However, any notices send via email will also be acceptable and valid; (j) this Agreement may be executed in counterparts; and (k) this Agreement is dated for all reference purposes October 14, 1998.
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies that notices must be delivered via personal delivery, express delivery service, or certified mail. The changed text adds that email is also acceptable. This directly contradicts the original list of acceptable methods, creating an in-text contradiction. The contradictory text is even in the same location, further confirming this contradiction. Therefore the change introduces a strong in-text contradiction as defined by the perturbation type inconsistencies.
